projects.tagline: Comprehensive management platform for companies, centers, workers, time tracking and digital signature notifications.
projects.businessProblem: CAE (External Prevention Service) clients needed centralized management of companies, work centers, workers, and time tracking compliance without relying on disconnected spreadsheets and manual processes.
projects.solutionOverview: ASP.NET Core MVC application providing complete CRUD operations for companies, centers, workers, and jobs. Features time tracking (Registro de Jornada) with signature workflows, notifications for document signing, and multi-client support with customizable themes.

keyFeatures.name: Company and Center Management
keyFeatures.description: Complete hierarchy management for companies, work centers, and associated workers with CSV template imports.
keyFeatures.value: Centralizes client data with consistent structure and easy bulk operations.
highlights: CSV template imports for bulk data

keyFeatures.name: Worker Registry and Job Management
keyFeatures.description: Comprehensive worker profiles with job types, trades, and company assignments.
keyFeatures.value: Maintains accurate worker records across all client organizations.
highlights: Worker profile with all employment details

keyFeatures.name: Time Tracking (Registro de Jornada)
keyFeatures.description: Digital time tracking system with shift management, daily logs, and compliance reporting.
keyFeatures.value: Automates labor compliance tracking and generates required reports.

keyFeatures.name: Digital Signature Notifications
keyFeatures.description: Notification system for workers to sign time tracking documents with email delivery and signature tracking.
keyFeatures.value: Ensures legal compliance with digital signature requirements.

observability.logging: Serilog with rolling file logs and structured logging.
observability.metrics: Health check endpoint and manual log review.

security.identity: ASP.NET Identity with seeded Admin role.
security.config: Connection strings and app settings in secure configuration.

risksAndChallenges: Legacy codebase requiring gradual modernization: mitigated with new features in separate modules.
Multi-client theming complexity: solved with CSS variables and client-specific stylesheets.
CSV template compatibility: validated with strict column mapping and error reporting.

impact.ops: Reduced manual data entry by 80% through CSV imports and centralized management.
impact.quality: Improved data consistency with validated templates and relationship enforcement.
impact.scalability: Template-driven approach supports adding new clients without code changes.

nextIterations: Implement API-first architecture for mobile apps
projects.callToAction: Available for technical demo of the platform and discussion on migration to modern .NET stack.

projects.tagline: Intelligent HR document management with AI classification, digital signature, and real-time collaboration via SignalR.
projects.businessProblem: Companies need centralized HR document management with digital signatures, worker self-service portals, and compliance tracking without managing local credentials or infrastructure.
projects.solutionOverview: Multi-tenant SaaS HR platform built with .NET 10, Blazor, and PostgreSQL. Features AI-powered document classification, three digital signature modes (OTP, simple, certificate), worker self-service portal without account requirements, SignalR real-time notifications, and full RBAC with subdomain-based tenant isolation.

keyFeatures.name: Multi-tenant Architecture
keyFeatures.description: Subdomain-based tenant resolution (e.g., primor.webrrhhpro.com) with complete data isolation and customizable branding.
keyFeatures.value: Single deployment serves multiple organizations with isolated data and custom branding.
highlights: Global query filters for tenant isolation

keyFeatures.name: Intelligent Document Management
keyFeatures.description: Complete document lifecycle with AI-powered classification, versioning, expiration tracking, and automated workflows.
keyFeatures.value: Eliminates paper-based processes with 95% reduction and complete audit trail.
highlights: Automatic lifecycle stages (Draft → Review → Validated → Expired)

keyFeatures.name: Digital Signature (3 Modes)
keyFeatures.description: Three signature options: OTP via email, simple signature, and certificate-based signature with visual PDF positioning.
keyFeatures.value: Legal validity with complete audit trail for every signature.
highlights: Visual positioning on PDF with QuestPDF

keyFeatures.name: Worker Self-Service Portal
keyFeatures.description: Anonymous access via secure link + OTP. Workers view and download their documents 24/7 without creating accounts.
keyFeatures.value: Empowers workers with self-service while reducing HR administrative burden.
highlights: No account required - link + OTP authentication

keyFeatures.name: Real-time with SignalR
keyFeatures.description: Live notifications for document status, signature progress, and system events across all connected clients.
keyFeatures.value: Instant updates without page refreshes, improving user experience.

keyFeatures.name: Mass Communications
keyFeatures.description: Bulk email sending with document attachments, customizable templates, and per-recipient delivery tracking.

layers: Domain - Entities, Enums, Value Objects, Interfaces
Application - DTOs, Use Cases, Service Interfaces
Infrastructure - EF Core, Identity, Supabase, MailKit

observability.logging: Structured logging with TenantId, UserId, CorrelationId context.
observability.metrics: Health checks and application metrics planned.

security.identity: ASP.NET Core Identity with RBAC roles.
security.authZ: TenantId resolved server-side, never accepted from client.

risksAndChallenges: Multi-tenant data isolation: solved with EF Core global query filters and BaseEntity inheritance.
Document classification accuracy: hybrid OCR + text approach with manual override capability.
Real-time scaling: SignalR hub optimized with tenant-based connection groups.

impact.ops: 95% paper elimination, 80% time reduction in signature workflows, 100% document traceability.
impact.quality: AI classification reduces manual sorting, expiration alerts prevent compliance gaps.
impact.scalability: Multi-tenant architecture enables growth without infrastructure changes.

nextIterations: GCP production deployment with managed PostgreSQL
projects.callToAction: Schedule a demo to explore the complete platform: multi-tenant setup, document management, digital signature workflows, and worker portal.
